hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/pre-push-validation.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; [ -f "$d/.claude/hooks/pre-push-validation.sh" ] && bash "$d/.claude/hooks/pre-push-validation.sh"
hooks.statusMessage: Running pre-push CI validation (format + build + tests)...

hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; bash "$d/.claude/hooks/check-dotfiles-sync.sh"

payload=$(cat); cmd=$(printf '%s' "$payload" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); case "$cmd" in "git push"*|*" git push"*|*"&& git push"*|*"; git push"*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; u=$(git -C "$PWD" remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null); case "$u" in *[/:]DTVMStack/DTVM|*[/:]DTVMStack/DTVM.git|*[/:]abmcar/DTVM|*[/:]abmcar/DTVM.git) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"[ci-monitor] Push to DTVM detected. In the BACKGROUND: 1) Run gh run list --limit 1 --json databaseId,status,workflowName,headBranch to find the triggered run. 2) Run gh run watch <id> --exit-status in background. 3) On completion, if failed: gh run view <id> --log-failed and diagnose. If passed: briefly report. Do NOT interrupt your current task for this."}}' ;; esac
